title: More Animals For You
description:
Adds more animals!
(Inspired by and best played with Alex's Mobs and Angling.)
body:
Adds more animals!
(Inspired by and best played with Alex's Mobs and Angling.)

Adds:
Submarine: moves through water and gives you water breathing while keeping out threats. (Just more expensive reusable Water Breathing potion)
Clear Submarine: Acts exactly the same as the normal submarine, you can just see through it easier.
Wise Wolf: Wolf but stronger.
Bearded Dragon: Eats flies and spiders. So just think of it as insect repellent. 
Mourning Gecko: Bearded Dragon but it just needs food to reproduce, no mate required.
Fly: Annoying idiot who ends up being food for reptiles. You can right click it to grab it and feed it to your pet lizards.
Siamese Fighting Fish: Also known as Betta fish, I made these act like normal fish but made them fight back if hit as a play on the name. The reason why blue and red are in different spawn eggs is because I couldn't get variations to work. Just know they are exactly the same, just look different.
Resplendent Quetzal: Fancy bird that eats flys! You can own one as a pet IN MINECRAFT but not in real life :( found in the new "Cloud Forest" biome. In real life, a cloud forest is just a forest that's in an eternal fog cloud.
Leaf Sheep: This animal isn't even a sheep. It is a SeaSlug (That you aren't allowed to own In real life, but I'll let you own them in MINECRAFT because I said so) IF you craft "UV Light" blocks, you can give it to them. (To make UV Light, you only need 1 Torch in the middle, and 1 purple dye on the right of it.)
Fishing Cat: Inspired by the real life fishing cat, it hunts fishes and is found in the Mangrove biome.
Shark: Found in oceans, it hunts fish, and just like in real life, it won't hurt you unless threatened. (But IRL they might eat you as a last resort. So just don't swim with sharks) And by threatened, I mean if you hurt them first.
Tiger Salamander: Only eats flys. Also the easiest salamander to own.
Magic Tiger Salamander: Tiger Salamander but it's more pretty!
Ball Python Snake: Don't hit it! (Currently hunts nothing because there is no mice.)
Baby Tiger Salamander: Temporary Axolotl (But in this case, it just stays baby)
Magic Baby Tiger Salamander: Similarly to the Magic Tiger Salamander, it's the same thing as the Baby Tiger Salamander, but it's prettier.
Palla's Cat: Angry Furball that eats any unlucky birds you bring to it. Don't mess with it, probably wouldn't make a good pet.

STUFF PLANNED:
Cat Update: Adds a bunch of cats. Such as the UFO (Unidentified Feline Otter) A cat that looks like an otter.
Dog Update: Adds a bunch of canines (usually non-existent ones that are fiction.)
